steps.title: Identify what we need to find
steps.content: The y-intercept is the point where the graph crosses the y-axis. This occurs when $x = 0$. To find it, we need to evaluate $f(0)$.

steps.title: Substitute x = 0 into the function
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into $f(x) = (-5)(6)x + 25$:

$$f(0) = (-5)(6)(0) + 25 = 0 + 25 = 25$$

The y-intercept is the point $(0, 25)$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
